title: hearth.command.design_request v1
description: Design/visualization request from Android or hearth-api. Consumed by deer-flow DesignRequestBusConsumer which calls POST /api/forge/visualize and publishes hearth.design.generated.v1 on completion. Producer: hearth-api/routes/forge.rs::post_design_request. Consumer: deer-flow/backend/.../design_request_consumer.py::DesignRequestBusConsumer (subscribes to hearth.command.design_request.*).

entity_key.description: Required. What to visualize — e.g. a bead id like 'deer-flow-xf5' or any other addressable entity.

prompt.description: Required. Description passed to the image model for generation.

callback_channel.description: Required. nervous-bus channel where the result event will be published — always 'hearth.design.generated.v1'.

requester.description: Required. Identity of who initiated the request (e.g. 'android-app' or 'human:eric').

style_hint.description: Optional rendering style passed to the image model (e.g. 'dark cyberpunk', 'blueprint', 'watercolor').

session_id.description: Optional. If tying this request to an existing Forge session, the session UUID goes here.
